## Provider name

## Export format

- [ ] JSON export
- [ ] SQLite database
- [ ] JSONL / NDJSON
- [ ] CSV
- [ ] API-based
- [ ] Other: ___

## Export instructions

How does a user obtain their conversation data from this provider?
